title: JSON path compiler accepts invalid input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, data NVARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, JSON_VALUE(data, '$.name') AS name FROM json_test WHERE CAST(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.value') AS INTEGER) > 100;
UPDATE json_test SET data = JSON_MODIFY(data, '$.new_key', 'new_value') WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: JSON path compiler accepts invalid JSON input
